rulings.Case Title: STTS APARTMENTS, LLC VS. LILLIAN TOWNS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonable Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 16, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT LILLIAN TOWNS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonable Attorney Fees GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff addressed the motion on the merits, thereby waiving insufficient notice. Defendant was the prevailing party at November 9, 2015 ex-parte hearing and attorneys' fees are awarded in the amount of $780. Defendant was not the prevailing party at the November 16, 2015 ex-parte hearing, which was taken off calendar for insufficient notice. = (501/REQ)
